title: Events & Training | Psychology Direct
description: Upcoming conferences, CPD workshops, and webinars for psychologists, psychiatrists, and education professionals.

blocks.headline: Learn, Grow, and Connect
blocks.subtitle: We run regular CPD webinars, training workshops, and conferences for psychologists, psychiatrists, and education professionals. Topics range from cutting-edge clinical practice to professional development and mental health awareness. Stay ahead in your field.

blocks.heading: What We Offer
blocks.subheading: Professional development, peer learning, and community

cards.title: CPD Webinars
cards.description: Interactive online sessions on topical issues relevant to psychologists and psychiatrists. Experts lead discussions. Earn CPD hours. Free for our professionals.

cards.title: Training Workshops
cards.description: In-depth workshops on specialist topics: AI and the Law, Understanding PDA, Supporting Gender-Diverse Young People, and more. Low cost for professionals.

cards.title: Annual Conference
cards.description: Our annual conference brings our community together to learn, network, and celebrate. Full day of talks, workshops, and social events.

blocks.heading: Want to Know About Future Events?
blocks.bodyText: Subscribe to our mailing list to get notified of upcoming webinars, workshops, and conferences. Never miss a professional development opportunity.

blocks.heading: Have an Event or Topic to Suggest?
blocks.bodyText: We welcome feedback on topics our professionals want to explore. Got a webinar idea? Know an expert who should lead a workshop? Tell us.
